name: TOTP MFA
description: TOTP (RFC 6238) multi-factor authentication for administrator login. Users self-enroll on first login (QR / key + code); every login after asks for the current code. Per-user secrets are stored encrypted in a dedicated USER_TOTP database table (MyBatis) with one-time-use (replay) protection. Includes a Settings tab to reset a user for lost-device recovery.
